MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF CONSENT JUDGMENT. (PER EX PARTE ORDER FILED ON 3-1-23)

Appearances (via ZOOM videoconference):
Cliff Chanler, Esq. of CHANLER LLC, Tel:203.594.9246, for plaintiff/moving party;
Brett Oberst, Esq. of DOLL AMIR & ELEY LLP, Tel:213.542.3380, for defendant.

HEARING HELD. (Heard concurrently with CGC-21-594849 Wozniak v. Amazon)

Mr. Chanler explained why no courtesy copies of the motion were submitted to the court.

Mr. Chanler also stated that he does not need a ruling on this motion. Therefore:

Plaintiff's Motion for Entry of Consent Judgment is ordered OFF CALENDAR by the court.

(See consent judgment in CGC-21-594849 Wozniak v. Amazon.)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (302/RBU)
